evals.prompt: How do I look up a person's LinkedIn profile data using their email address in Enrich.so?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using Enrich.so reverse email lookup to retrieve LinkedIn profile data

assertions.name: mentions_reverse_email_endpoint
assertions.description: Mentions reverse email lookup endpoint or API

assertions.name: mentions_returned_data_points
assertions.description: Mentions returned data points like job title, company, or LinkedIn URL

evals.prompt: I want to find email addresses for a list of LinkedIn profiles in bulk using Enrich.so
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using Enrich.so bulk enrichment for LinkedIn-to-email lookups

assertions.name: mentions_async_processing
assertions.description: Mentions async processing with webhook or polling for results

evals.prompt: How do I use the Enrich.so API to find similar companies to a target account?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using the Enrich.so API for similar company discovery

assertions.name: mentions_filtering_options
assertions.description: Mentions filtering by location or employee size
